text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know how I'm supposed to face
everyone now...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All those people cheered for someone like me...
for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe this truly is as good as I'll ever be.
choice_data_list: Don't worry. You can get better.
Don't worry. You can get better.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe this truly is as good as I'll ever be.
choice_data_list: Don't worry. You can get better.
Don't worry. You can get better.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Setting unrealistic expectations won't do either of
us any good.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Even so... do you truly think that this loser can improve?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Take responsibility and train me. I'll endure it,
however hard it may be.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Can you help me become someone worth
believing in?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Thank you. I won't forget what you just
said.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I'm such a helpless idiot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've known that all along, but still... I just can't
give up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: 'Cause I don't think I can just give up yet!
choice_data_list: Let's keep moving forward, one step at a time!
